text:
RT @gauravahuja: A small update to the 100 Year Conversation we’re excited about:

We’ve added tooltip companions to our interviews: archiv…

RT @williamlegate: hiring a growth engineer to work closely with me on bringing Polymarket to the next billion users

if your GitHub looks…
@shayne_coplan is going to fire me for setting all these rewards
claude code taking too long, trying codex https://t.co/DpV73r6jIg

The CTF contract is not exploited, it’s an internal address we use for ops. 

POL was being sent to that address because  it was in an internal refiller service that checks and refills balances every couple of seconds. 

All user funds are safe and the address is being rotated.

Introducing taker tier rebate program - https://t.co/4FZiXsX4UI

Get rebated up to 50% of all trading fees on polymarket, earn $ level up bonuses, and be eligible for large future rewards. 

Will be live starting next week 🙂
🤔 https://t.co/mLD6g3Tf2S

more rewards coming for the rest of the markets

https://t.co/oKeBHFdCSR https://t.co/LeOz3KGLIt
just over a year at polymarket, been a great run 😛 https://t.co/ezzmALG4Lt

ghost fill issues were finally solved today. you should see an order of magnitude better execution on all your orders. 

if you've been impacted by these issues for the past couple of weeks, dm me and I will personally onboard you 🙂
polymarket is a household name because of the 10/10 marketing. The cmo built it from 200 -> 3M+ users in 2 years 😛

one tap trading is live on 5M & 15M crypto markets 😛

dm me with any feedback https://t.co/oqeuNMLvR0
olivia is very cool 😛
go make some $$$ by placing limit orders 😛 https://t.co/lcYfBQsh79

enjoy 🙂
